# Fastmvc_Dashboards

Dashboards extension for FastMVC (health, API, queues, tenants, secrets, workflows).

## Install

```bash
pip install fastmvc_dashboards
```

Editable (development):

```bash
pip install -e .
```

## Repository

`https://github.com/shregar1/fastmvc-dashboards`

## Tooling

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md), [Makefile](Makefile), and [PUBLISHING.md](PUBLISHING.md).
